prs.label: Pull requests
prs.description: Comma-separated nixpkgs PR numbers to watch. Bare numbers, #123, or full GitHub PR URLs all work. Example: 530302, 528900

target_branch.label: Target branch
target_branch.description: Notify when a PR reaches this branch. Common values: nixos-unstable, nixos-unstable-small, nixpkgs-unstable, master, nixos-25.05.

poll_interval.label: Poll interval (seconds)
poll_interval.description: How often to check nixpk.gs. Minimum 60 seconds; default 600 (10 minutes).
